_comment: Append-only floor for the anchor ledger (khipu/lutar_lean_receipts.ndjson). verify-anchor-receipts.yml fails LOUDLY if either surface drops below this many receipts, so a wiped or truncated ledger can never pass green with 'nothing to check'. AUTO-MAINTAINED: lutar-lean's anchor_szl_lake.py raises this to the new chain length in the SAME signed commit that appends a receipt (chain_index N => min_receipts N); never lowered.
